detail_html:
💖Welcome to Our Store💖
✨100% Brand New
✨100% Quality Assurance
✨Follow Us, Get More Promotions


✨18650✨
Specification: 18650 5800mAh Lithium-Ion Rechargeable Battery
● Type：Li-Ion
●Nominal Capacity：5800mAh
●Battery Number：1pcs
●Size：1.7cm x 6.7cm(including pointed tip)
●Model：ICR 18650 Battery
●Rechargeable：1000 cycles, theoretically
●Charging Time: About 4 Hour
●Rated Voltage：3.7V (4.2V after fully charged, discharge cut-off voltage 3V)
●Net Weight：About 36g/1.27oz


✨AA/AAA✨
✨ 1. Eco-Friendly & Healthy - No heavy metal harmful substances such as lead, mercury or cadmium, safe for long-term use and no irreversible damage to human body.
✨ 2. Super High Cycle Life - Can be recharged up to 1200 times, equivalent to 1200 disposable dry batteries, more economical and environmentally friendly.
✨ 3. Family Essential - Solves the power supply problem of various household devices, a must-have for every family.
✨ 4. Easy to Charge - Suitable for any USB charger that supports AA / AAA batteries.

Product Details
AA 3000mAh
AAA 1100mAh
Recharge up to 1,200 times.
Suitable for USB charger AA/AAA

✨18650 Single Slot Charger✨
Please note: The indicator light is red when the product is charged, but it will not change color when fully charged. The general battery only needs to be charged for 4 hours.
Function:
1. Fast charging
2. Voltage protection design
3. Wide compatibility
4. Charging indicator led

Support 26650/18650/17670/14500/10440/16340 Rechargeable Battery

Model number: JR2020-1
Input: DC5V
Output: 3.7V*0.5A

✨18650 Four Slot Charger✨
The indicator light is red when charging, and automatically turns green when fully charged (also green when there is no battery)
Function:
1. Fast charging
2. Overcharge protection, stop when full, fast heat dissipation
3. Spring battery compartment with four slots for independent control
4. Compatible with 18650/14500 and other rechargeable lithium batteries

Model: YH-18650-4U
Size: 11.5*8.5*3CM
Output: 3.7V*2A

💖Notice：
1. We checked all the lights and confirmed that everything was normal before sending.
2.If the product is in a broken state when you receive it, please do not complete your order and contact me in time. I can help you replace/return （Please don't give me bad comments directly）
3.If it is urgent, please come to our store to pick up the goods, please contact me in advance
4.If you are satisfied with our products, please give five stars to praise, we will be more motivated to provide quality services
